details.productUrlName: Infernal Spawn of Infernal Spawn of Evil

customAttributes.description:
Flying, first strike, trample
Once each turn, while you're searching you library, you may pay 1B, reveal Infernal Spawn of Infernal Spawn of Evil from your library and say "I'm coming, too!" If you do, Infernal Spawn of Infernal Spawn of Evil deals 2 damage to a player of your choice.demon
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 2/29/2020. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
